vehicle.label: Force-Feedback Haptic Glove Pair
vehicle.desc: Wearable force-feedback exo-glove pair for VR grasp resistance, serviceable actuator cartridges, linkages, wrist band, and dorsal control module

parts.label: Dorsal Control Module x 2
parts.spec: Snap-in dorsal electronics and battery module, tool-less lid, wireless board bay, service label and cable exits

parts.label: Finger Exo Linkage Cartridge x 10
parts.spec: Two-segment exoskeleton finger linkage cartridge, single-pin removable, hinge datum pads, thimble slip interface

parts.label: Flexion-Resistance Actuator x 10

parts.spec: Quick-release wrist band, cable raceway, soft-contact interface, buckle, dorsal module anchor

parts.label: Cable Raceway + Harness Cover x 2
parts.spec: Snap-fit cable routing cover from wrist band to fingers, strain relief slots, inspection windows

parts.label: Finger Thimble Interface Set
parts.spec: Replaceable fingertip thimbles, slip-clearance sockets, soft liner cue, per-finger label and hinge pin access

parts.label: Palm Sensor Plate x 2
parts.spec: Palm-side flex/bend sensor channel plate, IMU mount pad, per-finger sensor channel exits, sensor connector pocket, washable liner interface

parts.label: Battery + Power Module x 2
parts.spec: Wrist battery pocket with quick-swap door, li-ion pack 2S 18650, BMS access window, power connector keying, charge LED window

parts.label: Wiring Loom + Service Loop Set
parts.spec: Knuckle-crossing wiring loom with service loops, strain relief at every flex boundary, flex-rated bend radius, power vs signal channel separation

parts.label: Knuckle Mount Rail x 2
parts.spec: Dorsal knuckle row mounting rail, actuator plug-in pockets, datum pads per finger station, fastener pattern and removal path

parts.label: Service Port + Flex-Wiring Inspection Cover
parts.spec: Flex_wiring closure module: service_loop inspection cover, strain_relief, bend_radius_note, connector keying, charge/debug service port, power vs signal separation label

generated_parts.label: Dorsal Control Module x 2
generated_parts.spec: Snap-in dorsal electronics and battery module, tool-less lid, wireless board bay, service label and cable exits

requirements: Subsystem module: Dorsal Control Module x 2
Snap-in dorsal electronics and battery module
Tool-less lid, wireless board bay, service label and cable exits
Electronics - Controller board on back-of-hand with standoffs and connector orientation
Power and signal lines run in separate channels or are spaced/crossed at right angles
Each electronics module states its grounding scheme and signal returns route alongside their signals
PCBs mount on standoffs with keep-out clearance to walls and moving parts, connector edges face access openings

verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value, and verify must include a mass/budget check.

verify.value: All required evidence_features are present in part_tree/geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Each required evidence_features must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.

verify.value: All interfaces with adjacent subsystems are named and reciprocal joint families are declared.
verify.rule: Name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back.

verify.value: Power and signal lines are separated or spaced at right angles.
verify.rule: Motor power lines and sensor/encoder signal lines run in separate channels or are spaced/crossed at right angles, with the separation visible in routing geometry.

verify.value: Grounding scheme and signal returns are clearly stated and routed.
verify.rule: Each electronics module states its grounding scheme (star point, chassis bond, isolated) and signal returns route alongside their signals.

verify.value: PCBs mount on standoffs with keep-out clearance to walls and moving parts, connector edges face access openings.
verify.rule: PCBs mount on standoffs with keep-out clearance to walls and moving parts, connector edges face access openings, and mounting holes match standard board patterns.

verify.value: Visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence is present for critical joints.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

risk.desc: The mass of the dorsal control module may exceed the target if additional features are added.
risk.mit: Review the design for potential weight reduction opportunities and ensure any new features are carefully evaluated for mass impact.

risk.desc: The service access cut may not be large enough for easy access to internal components.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the service access cut if necessary to ensure easy access for maintenance.

risk.desc: The ventilation channel may not provide sufficient airflow for heat dissipation.
risk.mit: Evaluate the airflow through the ventilation channel and adjust the design if necessary to ensure adequate cooling.

Heat dissipation from controller board through ventilation channel
Service access and cable exit for maintenance

verification_focus.description: Ensure the subsystem mass does not exceed 100g
Verify proper grounding and return path routing

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Flex/bend sensor channels per finger, IMU mount on hand plate

physics_paths.description: Finger and wrist wiring uses service loops, strain relief at every flex boundary, and a stated bend radius sized for repeated flexion cycles.
Motor power lines and sensor/encoder signal lines run in separate channels or are spaced/crossed at right angles, with the separation visible in routing geometry.
Each electronics module states its grounding scheme (star point, chassis bond, isolated) and signal returns route alongside their signals.
PCBs mount on standoffs with keep-out clearance to walls and moving parts, connector edges face access openings, and mounting holes match standard board patterns.

integration_opportunities.description: Ensure finger and wrist wiring uses service loops and strain relief.
